inputs.health_text: Patient is a 52-year-old male presenting with fatigue lasting approximately three weeks. Blood pressure recorded at 145/92 mmHg on two separate visits. HbA1c of 7.8% recorded six months ago. Current medications include metformin 500mg twice daily and lisinopril 10mg daily. No known drug allergies. Family history includes type 2 diabetes (mother) and hypertension (father). BMI 28.4.
